tower_28.voice: Approachable, friendly, conversational, expert-not-clinical, and about 8.5/10 casual. Tagline energy: Good Clean Fun and It's OK to be sensitive. Avoid cure, heal, or treat language. Frame products as safe for sensitive or eczema-prone skin, never clinical or sterile. Instagram: 75-250 words, 1-3 emoji such as sparkle, pink heart, or sun, relaxed CTA. TikTok: demo or creator-friend voice, under 150 character caption. Email: benefit-led subject, 30-50 characters, 0-1 emoji.
compliance_notes: Use support, soothe, calm, and comfort language instead of cure or heal claims.
Do not imply the product changes skin structure or treats diagnosable conditions.

half_magic.voice: Bold, artistic, playful, irreverent, inclusive, and about 9/10 casual. Sells experimentation, not perfection, with a backstage-friend voice. Avoid flawless, corrective, anti-aging, or clinical language. TikTok: fast tutorial or trend style, under 100 character captions. Instagram: hook first, high emoji density such as sparkle, purple heart, black heart, rainbow, star, lightning, or disco ball, spaced throughout copy and not only at the end. Product names should appear in ALL CAPS with an intentional mix of lowercase and caps within captions. CTA can include tag us or shop now. Email: playful or curious subject, 25-45 characters, casual.
compliance_notes: Avoid medical, therapeutic, or guaranteed performance claims.
Make color payoff and creative expression the center of the message.
